theme_and_archetype.description: A distinctive, warm, and professional CRM that feels human and editorial. Avoids the standard cold 'tech/SaaS' aesthetic by utilizing rich terracotta accents, warm stone backgrounds, and elegant typography. No purple or teal gradients.

rules: Use Cabinet Grotesk for KPI numbers, dashboard titles, and bold highlights.
Use Manrope for dense data tables, lists, and form inputs for max legibility.

primary.description: Rich Terracotta - signifies action and warmth

secondary.description: Deep Navy - for strong authoritative contrast like the sidebar or dark headers

anti_patterns: No pure #000000 or pure #FFFFFF backgrounds for the entire page (use #F9F8F6 for main body).

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards instead of standard p-4.

cards.style: Clean white backgrounds with 1px stone borders (border-stone-200) and soft ambient shadow.

kanban_board.column: bg-stone-50/50 rounded-2xl p-4 min-w-[300px] border border-stone-100
kanban_board.item: bg-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-stone-200 cursor-grab hover:border-[#C05B43]/50 transition-colors

tables.style: No vertical dividers. Generous horizontal padding. Table headers should use the 'overline' typography style.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C05B43] text-white hover:bg-[#A64D37] shadow-sm rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-stone-700 border border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-xl px-4 py-2

inputs.style: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C05B43]/20 focus:border-[#C05B43] transition-all

sidebar.style: bg-[#F9F8F6] border-r border-stone-200 w-64 flex flex-col p-4
sidebar.link_active: bg-white border border-stone-200 text-[#C05B43] shadow-sm rounded-xl

stage_badges.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold inline-flex items-center ring-1 ring-inset

login_background.description: Historic college chapel and buildings with a large green lawn. Use with a bg-black/30 overlay.

technical_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react. It provides a polished, professional look suitable for an elegant CRM.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
technical_instructions.data_viz: Use Recharts for Analytics (Funnel, Bar, Leaderboard). Use the primary Terracotta and Secondary Navy colors for chart bars/lines.
technical_instructions.ui_library: Use Shadcn/UI but heavy customization required to remove the default 'Vercel-look'. Increase padding and border radii, and ensure borders use the stone-200 color instead of default gray.
technical_instructions.drag_and_drop: Use a lightweight library like dnd-kit or react-beautiful-dnd for the Kanban boards.
